iterations.theme: From Football to Frizer: A Journey of Vocation, Faith, and Entrepreneurship
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript is shorter than the minimum required length for a single iteration (35-45 minutes), so it is presented as one complete thematic block covering the guest's professional and personal journey.
